step1.heading: Select a product
step1.hint: Only products with active or expiring warranties can be claimed.
step1.emptySubtitle: All your warranties have expired. Add a new product to get started.

step2.heading: Describe the issue
step2.issuePh: e.g. Screen not turning on after drop
step2.detailPh: Describe when the issue started, steps to reproduce, and any error messages…

step3.heading: Review your claim
step3.aiTipText: Keep your original purchase receipt and packaging ready. Most manufacturers require proof of purchase to process warranty claims.
step3.noCenters: No service centers found for this brand.

success.title: Claim Submitted
success.message: Your claim for {{product}} has been recorded. Keep your purchase receipt ready — the manufacturer may request it during processing.

errors.sessionNotLoaded: User session not loaded. Please refresh and try again.
